name: Deep Dish Apple Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 tablespoons Ice water (may need up to 7 tablespoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the flour and salt into a bowl. Cut in the margarine with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. Stir in the ice water; mix lightly. Form the dough into a ball.
3. Roll out two-thirds of the dough to fit a 10x6x2 inch baking dish. Transfer to the baking dish.
4. Combine sugar, remaining 1/4 cup flour, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Mix with apples and lemon juice. Pile into the baking dish.
5. Roll out the remaining one-third of the pastry. Cover the pie; seal the edges and flute.
6. Cut several large slits in the top.
7. Bake at 425°F for 40 minutes. Reduce heat to 350°F.
8. Remove the pie from the oven and pour cream through the slits in the top of the pie. Bake an additional 10 minutes.
